_comment: The manifest that generates this fixture's committed agd_move_scan.json (the R3B worked fixture). Hand-authored located observations — NOT a real judge run; the fingerprint is a fixture token, not a SHA. Regenerate the artifact from the repo root with: python3 <setec-voiceprint>/plugins/setec-voiceprint/scripts/agd_move_scan.py evals/fixtures/argument-agd/cue-free-structural-discounting/source.md --judge manifest --judge-manifest evals/fixtures/argument-agd/cue-free-structural-discounting/scan-manifest.json --out evals/fixtures/argument-agd/cue-free-structural-discounting/agd_move_scan.json --out-md /tmp/agd_move_scan.md

observations.span: several of whom asked how younger children would be supervised on the fifth day
The pilot districts report higher teacher retention
